issues.title: Remove WatsonX AI text generation model support
issues.body:
Currently, WatsonX model API is based on the Watson text generation capabilities. This has been replaced by the new Chat model which we support instead. 

https://www.ibm.com/watsonx/developer/capabilities/chat

If anyone is interested in maintaining the current version, please create an issue [here](https://github.com/spring-ai-community/community/issues)
